headlines.title: Trump Uses Prime-Time Speech to Revive False Election Claims
headlines.description: President Donald Trump used his prime-time speech Thursday to raise questions about election integrity in the build-up to November’s key midterms while reviving false claims about the 2020 election and asserting that China targeted his campaign. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: How Trump's election allegations against China could impact relations with U.S.
headlines.description: President Trump accused China of having a role in influencing the 2020 election during his speech about election interference. NBC News' Garrett Haake has more on how this could impact China's relationship with the U.S.

headlines.title: Iranian bridges severely damaged after sixth night of U.S. strikes
headlines.description: Bridges were severely damaged in Iran after the U.S. military said it completed its sixth consecutive night of strikes against the country. CENTCOM said in a statement posted on X that it targeted “coastal surveillance and air defense sites, military logistics infrastructure, and maritime capabilities.”

headlines.title: Maine Democratic Senate candidates discuss which of Platner's ideas they would use
headlines.description: Maine Democratic Senate candidates Nirav Shah, Shenna Bellows, Jordan Wood and Troy Jackson discuss which ideas from Graham Platner's platform they would use if they are chosen as the nominee.

headlines.title: Taylor Farms Lettuce at Taco Bell Linked to Stomach Bug Outbreak
headlines.description: The Food and Drug Administration is investigating a potential connection to iceberg lettuce supplied to Taco Bell by produce giant Taylor Farms as the possible source of the cyclosporiasis outbreak that has sickened thousands across 34 states. The fast-food giant is announcing a voluntary recall of some potentially impacted lettuce from its restaurants. NBC’s Anne Thompson reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Wife of Colombian father killed by ICE in Maine says they had planned to grow old together
headlines.description: Karolina Rojas wanted to make sure that her husband, Johan Sebastián Durán Guerrero, was remembered the right way after he was fatally shot by an ICE officer in Biddeford, Maine.

headlines.title: Pro-Kremlin blogger who turned on Putin is arrested as Russia steps up crackdown
headlines.description: A former loyalist blogger turned fierce critic of Russian President Vladimir Putin has been detained and accused of spreading false information about the armed forces, state media reported Friday.

headlines.title: U.S. strikes bridges around key port in Iran, expanding campaign in battle over Hormuz
headlines.description: The United States attacked bridges and other key infrastructure in southern Iran overnight into Friday, capping nearly a week of strikes aimed at intensifying pressure on Tehran to give up control of the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: Federal panel signals it could support permanent fencing around White House park known for protests
headlines.description: A historic hub for free speech and protest is under the spotlight as the Trump administration proposes adding permanent fencing around Lafayette Square.

headlines.title: 53+ best new products in July from Hoka, Beis, Olaplex and more
headlines.description: We rounded up July’s newest tech, home and beauty products. Shop the Hoka Clifton 11, Beis Weekender, Olaplex serum oil mist and more.

headlines.title: Talking Shop with Béis founder Shay Mitchell
headlines.description: Béis used customer feedback to redesign its core collection of travel essentials, including The Weekender. Founder Shay Mitchell shares what’s new and what she packs inside.

headlines.title: Deal of the Day: Medicube’s new skin care device is already over 25% off on Amazon
headlines.description: Medicube’s Booster Pro X2 is 26% off. The new device is an upgrade to the Booster Pro and has seven modes that work for all skin types.
